please upload a 60-90-second introduction video to a google drive folder. you should appear on camera from the waist up with your face and hand gestures visible to the audience. in the video, please provide a brief overview of your work experience/s ( in english ) that is/are relevant to the position you are applying for. once you have uploaded the video, please share the link below and ensure that the folder's sharing settings are set to "anyone with the link."(do not use slideshow presentations). please upload a 60-90-second introduction video to a google drive folder. you should appear on camera from the waist up with your face and hand gestures visible to the audience. in the video, please provide a brief overview of your work experience/s ( in english ) that is/are relevant to the position you are applying for. once you have uploaded the video, please share the link below and ensure that the folder's sharing settings are set to "anyone with the link."(do not use slideshow presentations).
